word.definition: Assiduous is a formal word that means “showing great care, attention, and effort.”

sports_fact.text: Tom Dempsey, born without toes on his kicking foot, hit a 63-yard field goal in 1970 — a record that stood for 43 years.

market.headline: All the Money Flooding Into AI Is a Giant Warning Sign
market.summary: When companies as a group turn into sellers, it’s a reasonable sign that stocks are very overpriced.

quote.text: The more complex the world situation becomes, the more scientific and rational analysis you have to have, the less you can do with simple good will and sentiment.
quote.author: Reinhold Niebuhr

history.text: Ellen Fairclough is sworn in as Canada's first female Cabinet Minister.
